using mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP) during the pre-
initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_MONPP_COINS_OS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was only populated 2007–2012. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a 
coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding co-payment 
variable called (PRE_ICL_MONPP_COPAY_OS).
